subject: FW: Join Jennie on July 5th
body:
From: Andrea Fauland [mailto:Andrea.Fauland@coreaccess.net] 
Sent: Friday, June 27, 2008 11:01 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Join Jennie on July 5th

 

Dear Mr. Epstein,

 

Jennie would love to have you over on July 5th for an afternoon of
cocktails and a special viewing of a new weekly show on Plum TV that she
is hosting. 

 

The show features fascinating conversations between people who transform
society and culture, most of who are rarely, if ever, seen on
television.  We are really excited about the amazing guests we have
lined up for the show, most of whom are fellow CORE: members. The first
episode, premiering July 5, features guests Andy Lack, Chairman of Sony
BMG, and Walter Isaacson, President and CEO of the Aspen Institute. 

 

Jennie would be thrilled if you could join her at her home in
Southampton, with festivities to begin at 4pm until 7 pm. The show will
air from 5 - 5.30 pm. 

 

Please let me know whether you will be able to be part of it and I will
send you the exact directions.

 

I look forward to hearing from you.

 

Warm regards,

 

Andrea

 

 

CORE: Andrea Fauland | Director of Administration | 66 East 55th Street
New York NY 10022 | Direct: 212 381 7812 | Fax: 212 486 6699 |
andrea.fauland@coreaccess.net <mailto:andrea.fauland@coreaccess.net>  |
www.coreaccess.net <http://www.coreaccess.net>  |

 

DISCLAIMER Important! This message is intended for the above named
person(s) only and is CONFIDENTIAL AND PROPRIETARY.
If you are not the intended recipient of this e-mail and have received
it in error, please forward to ITsupport@coreaccess.net with
'Received in Error' as the subject and then delete it from your mailbox.
Accessing, copying or re-using any of the information contained
in this e-mail by anyone other than the intended recipient is
unauthorized. Thank you.

From: Andrea Fauland [mailto:Andrea.Fauland@coreaccess.net]
Sent: Friday, June 27, 2008 11:01 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Join Jennie on July 5th

 

Dear Mr. Epstein,

 

Jennie would love to have you over on July 5th for an afternoon of cocktails and a special viewing of a new weekly show on Plum TV that she is hosting.

 

The show features fascinating conversations between people who transform society and culture, most of who are rarely, if ever, seen on television.  We are really excited about the amazing guests we have lined up for the show, most of whom are fellow CORE: members. The first episode, premiering July 5, features guests Andy Lack, Chairman of Sony BMG, and Walter Isaacson, President and CEO of the Aspen Institute. 

 

Jennie would be thrilled if you could join her at her home in Southampton, with festivities to begin at 4pm until 7 pm. The show will air from 5 – 5.30 pm.

 

Please let me know whether you will be able to be part of it and I will send you the exact directions.

 

I look forward to hearing from you.

 

Warm regards,

 

Andrea

 

 

CORE: Andrea Fauland | Director of Administration | 66 East 55th Street New York NY 10022 | Direct: 212 381 7812 | Fax: 212 486 6699 | andrea.fauland@coreaccess.net | www.coreaccess.net |
